title: PortfolioRecord v1
description: Per-project health aggregate for agent consumption. One record per project, carrying counts, priority breakdown, velocity with trend, composite health score, top blocker, and stalest issue.

project.description: Project key. Normally the SourceRepo. 'unknown' for global-mode issues with empty SourceRepo; 'local' fallback for single-project mode with no repo name.

blocked.description: Count of open/in_progress issues with at least one open/in_progress incoming blocker. Matches IsBlocked semantics from compact_issue.v1.

closed_30d.description: Closures in the last 30 days. Matches Velocity.Closures30d.

p0.description: Count of OPEN issues with priority 0.

p1.description: Count of OPEN issues with priority 1.

trend.description: Derived from weekly closures: 'up' if recent 2-week window >=20% above prior 4-week window normalized; 'down' if <=-20%; 'flat' otherwise (including no-prior-activity).

estimated.description: True when closure dates were approximated from updated_at because closed_at was missing.

health_score.description: Composite health in [0,1], rounded to 3 decimals. Equal-weight mean of closure_ratio, (1-blocker_ratio), (1-stale_norm).

top_blocker.description: Project-scoped open/in_progress issue with highest PageRank among those blocking at least one other issue. Omitted when no candidates exist.

stalest.description: Open/in_progress issue with the oldest updated_at. Omitted when no open issues exist.
